# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- Project rules to follow: .NET 10 WPF; MVVM Toolkit only; no code-behind logic; async/await everywhere; use ObservableProperty + RelayCommand; Clean Architecture; follow existing codebase; requests may involve converting HTML/CSS to XAML.
- Always check for errors (build/compile diagnostics) after making changes; user reports there are many errors and wants error checking to be done consistently.
